name: Chocolate Cherry and Pistachio Friands
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 15 minutes | cooking time 25 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Grease a friand pan with cooking spray.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the powdered sugar, flour, almond flour, and chopped pistachios.
Stir in the lemon zest, egg whites, and butter.
Stir in the pistachios and sour cherries.
Transfer the batter to the prepared pan. Bake for 25 minutes.
Serve with a dusting of powdered sugar.
